products.name: Hot chocolate sticks
products.description: Hot chocolate sticks made with rich mix of milk and dark chocolate. Simply place in a cup of hot milk and stir continuously until fully melted for a warm, creamy chocolate drink. (1 pec)
products.descriptionAr: هوت شوكلت ستيكس مزيج من الشوكولاتة البني مع الشوكلاتة الدارك والكاكاو الخام، توضع علي كوب لبن ساخن مع التقليب المستمر لحين الذوبان ( 1 قطعة)

settings.ourStorySubtitle: Crafting moments of joy, one chocolate at a time.
settings.ourStoryBeginning: Founded with a passion for the art of chocolatiering, CHOCO-CELIA started as a small kitchen experiment. Our founder, driven by a love for pure, high-quality ingredients, sought to create chocolates that were not only delicious but also visually stunning.
settings.ourStoryPhilosophy: We believe in the power of handmade. Every piece of chocolate that leaves our workshop is crafted by hand, ensuring the perfect temper, snap, and shine. We source our cocoa beans from sustainable farms and pair them with the finest local ingredients to create unique flavor profiles.
settings.heroSubtitle: Experience the finest handmade chocolates, crafted with passion and premium ingredients.
settings.featureCard1Description: Only the finest cocoa and fresh ingredients.
settings.featureCard2Description: Crafted in small batches for perfection.
